programme.title: Lies, Crimes and Video: Killer Dad: Chris Watts Speaks
programme.desc: ‘Loving’ father Chris Watts turns into one of the nation's most notorious killers overnight. Secret videos document a series of chilling murders from start to finish, revealing lies, a scandalous affair and a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Deceit
programme.desc: Women in a small Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who becomes so experienced he leaves no clues to his identity. But computer technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool: geographical profiling.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Vows
programme.desc: Some of the refugees who sought asylum in the United States after World War II lied about the atrocities in which they’d participated. Years later, a high-ranking religious figure is suspected of war crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Payback
programme.desc: In 1993 a 20 year old boy is found beaten to death and murdered in Florida. Soon, a bizarre story unfolds of sex, jealousy, and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: See No Evil
programme.desc: Police uncover a string of murdered prostitutes, each of which have had their eyes carved out.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: 5-Year Old Vanished
programme.desc: Five-year-old Haleigh Cummings disappears from her home after her dad’s girlfriend puts her to bed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Proof

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Fatal Inheritance
programme.desc: Dr. Bill Lidner collapses just hours after returning home from a family trip overseas. His young daughters find him bleeding on the stairs of their Ohio home. They didn’t know it then, but it is the first sign that something is very wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Second Shot at Love
programme.desc: A respected heart surgeon is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home and have police assuming he committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Journey to Justice
programme.desc: Prosecutor used video testimony to link drunk driver to hit-and-run which killed a child.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Double Trouble
programme.desc: A Maine State Trooper is attacked during a routine stop which triggers a chain of events that jump starts a stalled murder case hundreds of miles away.

programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.desc: Newlywed Sherri Rasmussen was found shot to death inside her Van Nuys, California home. For more than two decades, police pursued the theory that she was killed in a burglary gone wrong, until DNA evidence points to a suspect with a personal motive.

programme.title: True Crime Live
programme.desc: Mike Galanos puts a spotlight on news and developments in criminal investigations.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Nazi Secrets Revealed
programme.desc: Josh heads to Europe to expose the last secrets of the Third Reich. The lost fortune of a Nazi war criminal draws Josh to Austria, where he may need to dive deep to find treasure. He also meets a researcher who may have made a historic find.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Legend of Jesse James
programme.desc: Josh journeys across the American Midwest in search of the legendary golden loot of Jesse James. Along the way, Josh debunks Jesse James myths, rappels off a cliff on Wichita Mt. and follows treasure hunters into Buzzards Roost.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Josh hunts down new evidence on the iconic disappearance of Amelia Earhart. He first treks to uncharted tribal lands of PNG, then ends his journey in Fiji hoping to uncover the human remains of Amelia.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mayan Apocalypse
programme.desc: Josh unearths human skulls and ancient Mayan sacrificial alters in the caverns underneath the jungles and ruins of Mexico while investigating the fall of the remarkable Mayan Empire.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Code to Gold
programme.desc: Josh scours Virginia backcountry in search of the legendary Thomas Beale Treasure, worth millions today. With encrypted codes hiding its whereabouts, Josh takes a detour to Philadelphia to uncover missing pieces to the puzzle.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: Epic Search
programme.desc: Josh Gates embarks on an epic search for the Ark of the Covenant, following in the footsteps of Indiana Jones. Then, he heads into the Rocky Mountains in search of a $2 million treasure.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Rediscovered: Josh and the Lost City of Gold
programme.desc: Josh Gates treks up the Andes in search of a mythical city of gold in Peru. Then he searches Mexico for answers about the lost Teotihuacan civilization. Afterwards, Josh Gates seeks a long-lost Incan mummy high in the Andes Mountains.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Viking Sunstone
programme.desc: Josh heads to the U.K. and Norway to unlock the secrets of the Viking Sunstone, a mystic crystal the Vikings used to conquer the sea. Before testing it, he explores a crypt in a Nordic church and descends 1,000 feet into a deserted mine.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Meltdown
programme.desc: Stranded in the middle of Zambia's hot, wild plains, Joe and Cody must avoid territorial hippos and herds of elephants to find water and shelter.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Mars on Earth
programme.desc: Two guys with two completely opposing approaches to survival take on one of the most barren landscapes on the planet, Chile's Atacama Desert.

programme.title: Dual Survival: On the Menu
programme.desc: Joe and Cody fight to get out alive while hiding from poachers who may be hunting them.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Misty Mountain Drop
programme.desc: In a classic wilderness survival scenario, Cody and Joe take on the mountains of Northern California.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: Isolated in the jungle of an uninhabited Hawaiian island, Joe and Cody lock heads over priorities.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Deadly Dunes
programme.desc: Marooned in a sea of sand dunes, Joe and Cody traverse the unforgiving desert and trek deep into the mountains of Oman. Threatened by dehydration and heatstroke, their journey shows how nomads have survived for millennia in this hyper-arid land.

programme.title: Dual Survival: No End in Sight
programme.desc: Stranded in a mangrove swamp in Sri Lanka, Joe and Cody escape the crocodile-filled waters only to find themselves in a leech-infested jungle. But this time, distressed elephants interrupt their journey back and they may not get out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: No End in Sight
programme.desc: Joe comes face-to-face with elephants and is forced off a cliff, Cody masters the ancient fire piston, and they cross a crocodile-infested lake to escape the longest survival scenario in history of 'Dual Survival.'

programme.title: Dual Survival: Glacial Downfall
programme.desc: On a glacier and clinging to opposite ends of a rope, Joe and Cody face their most challenging rescue scenario ever. The frozen landscape brings Joe and Cody's opposing survival styles to the forefront of this journey.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dunes of Despair
programme.desc: A laid back wilderness instructor and his go-getter 'wild child' survival mate are dropped onto the sun-scorched, desolate sand dunes of Brazil. In this bleak landscape of blinding white sand, they battle hunger, dehydration and, ultimately, each other.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Mayan Misery
programme.desc: Two survivalists are challenged to survive in a flooded jungle of Belize. The man and woman must face a labyrinth of Mayan caves filled with poisonous snakes and rabid bats.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Jungle Curse
programme.desc: Two naked survivalists are challenged to survive for 21 days in the Costa Rican rainforest.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Worth the Weight
programme.desc: Kristy lost 100 pounds and is looking for the right dress to show off her new figure. Kristin lost 40 pounds and is excited to fit into dress samples.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Image Is Everything
programme.desc: Randy's day is nonstop as he assists brides and auditions models for his runway show. Bride Emanuela wants a sexy ball gown and she's not afraid to throw her dad's budget out the window. Marlena is finally dress shopping for a wedding years in the making.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: 2 Dresses, 1 Dream
programme.desc: Jacqueline wastes no time explaining that she would like two different style dresses for her wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Race Against Time
programme.desc: Edwina has only three months to go before her wedding; Michelle sees her dress for the first time since losing 50 pounds.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: You're Sexy and You Know It
programme.desc: Bride Aimee says she wants a dress that's tight, blingy and, to use her words, 'a little slutty'. Yovanna and her two friends have flown in to find her a dress that shows off the figure she's so proud of. Sahar, a belly dancing paralegal, has her fitting.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Better Than the First
programme.desc: Mackenzie is on the hunt for a third dress to replace the two she already has. Kelly is looking for a dress that can outdo the one she found, which is over her budget. Rachael is looking to replace a lace mermaid gown she bought and now can't stand.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: It Fits, She Scores!
programme.desc: Kristi is marrying a pro-baseball pitcher and is looking for a glitzy dress to compliment her luxurious lifestyle. Sports fan Jenna wants a dress that will knock it out of the park. Jennifer hopes that her boss will help her find the dress of her dreams.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: That Looks Like a Torture Device
programme.desc: Bridget's feelings about the perfect dress for her wedding to pro snowboarder Scott Lago get turned upside-down by her opinionated entourage. Meanwhile, new mom Karyssa wants a dress with lots of coverage and Lauren hopes she fits into her gown.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Lacey's Story
programme.desc: Lacey ballooned up over 600 lbs on pizza and ice cream and knows Dr. Now is her best hope for success. She must now rally her divorced parents around her for support and find a way to modulate her moods that won't include binge-eating.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: My Teeth Are Lost in the Pile
programme.desc: When Kyle first met Lynn, he thought she was the answer to all of his problems, but years later, she's transformed his home into a heap of trash. Now on the verge of foreclosure, the couple will either get along enough to clean, or kill each other trying.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Hoo, This Reeks!
programme.desc: Kathy's extreme hoarding forced her 12-year-old son to move out of their home.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Hoo, This Reeks!

programme.desc: Chris tackles the mystery of why a woman was left in a box hours after being born near an Ohio gas station. A woman enlists Lisa's help to locate her biological mother, but what they discover, no one is prepared for, and changes the woman's life forever.

programme.desc: A trip to the Busbys' old home brings a surprise. Adam's job situation faces a new development. Meanwhile, the Busbys brace for bad news at Hazel's eye appointment and Danielle and the Quants come up with a creative way to give back to the NICU.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Quintessential Questions
programme.desc: The Busbsys answer viewers' burning questions about their crazy lives raising quints. Through interviews and never before seen footage, Adam, Danielle and the girls give insight on all those things people have wanted to know and were not afraid to ask.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Roy and Ben
programme.desc: Ben and Roy show off their frugal lifestyles. Ben throws a party on a four dollar budget and Roy shows how he freezes his assets.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Abdul and Vickie
programme.desc: Abdul and Vickie take cheapness to a whole new level, from haggling the price of an anniversary cake to using road kill for gifts.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Jeff
programme.desc: Jeff travels by bike to save on gas, crashes on his friends' couch, and repays their kindness by serving a cringe-worthy meal.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Diving for Dollars

programme.title: Long Island Medium: When a Bedroom Door Closes, a Closet Door Opens
programme.desc: With Larry Jr officially moved out, a heartsick Theresa decides to ease her pain by giving his old bedroom a makeover.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Roller Rink Romance
programme.desc: When Theresa and Larry head to the roller rink to relive the 1980s, she realizes they have never been roller skating together.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Return to Jail
programme.desc: Last year Theresa did a reading for a group of female inmates. After reuniting with a young woman she met during her visit to jail, Theresa decides to return to the facility to do another reading, but this time she's reading a group of male inmates.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Behind the Scenes of Knock and Shock
programme.desc: From Theresa traveling in disguise to backstage mishaps and tensions, we pull back the curtain on what it took to pull off Long Island Medium's first Live Knock and Shock. Plus, never before seen bonus footage of the reading.

programme.title: E! True Hollywood Story: Is Fame an Addiction?

programme.title: Botched: Foreign Bodies

programme.title: Botched: J-Cup Juggernaut

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Tournament Of Champions: Part 1

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Tournament Of Champions: Part 2

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Tournament of Champions: Part 4

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Best of Chocolate Lovers
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is sharing some of the recipes that have rocked her chocolate-loving family's world through the years. There's Ladd's chocolate pie, his all-time favourite dessert, and chocolate butterscotch caramel bars.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Make Your Own Takeout
programme.desc: For fans of Indian takeout or home cooks looking for a new way to cook beef, Rachael's quick, easy beef pepper fry: Indian-spice pepper steak will become an instant favourite. The secret is a mixture of warm, earthy spices with bright vegetables.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Burger Night Done Right
programme.desc: Skip the restaurant, stay home and make Rachael's Oklahoma-style smack burger in 30 minutes or less. Smashing slices of Vidalia onions into the patties and adding a simple sauce makes them juicy. On the side Rachael makes ranch-flavoured tater tots.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Chicken Change-Up
programme.desc: Rachael's deviled chicken francese gets its devilish flavor from a mixture of spicy Calabrian chile paste, tangy Dijon mustard and sharp pecorino Romano cheese. She serves charred bread and arugula on the side to avoid wasting sauce.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Trendy Fried Chicken
programme.desc: Rachael uses a Korean-inspired batter and slaw to shake up the traditional fried chicken game. Vodka and corn-starch in the batter are the secret to light and crispy skin on Korean fried chicken and her kimchi slaw puts a spin on cabbage slaw.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Not Your Mom's Sloppy Joes
programme.desc: For a Korean-unspired sloppy joe, Rachael mixes ground pork and beef with new ingredients like pears, sesame oil and gochujang. Her quick Korean pickles add a sweet crunch that rounds out the sandwich.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: It's Not Delivery, It's Cast Iron Skillet Pan Pizza
programme.desc: Rachael makes her favourite pizza at home in a cast iron skillet. Spicy sausage, chili flakes and honey liven up her sausage pizza, and her fennel and olive salad is a bright, refreshing complement to the hot and cheesy pizza.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Essential Cooking Tools
programme.desc: Ree finds some great tools at a local kitchen store to give as a wedding gift. As she purchases the tools, she shares some great dishes she can make with each.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Sweet Deliveries
programme.desc: Ree's had an epic day ramping up dessert recipes on her blog and now she's sharing.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Any Given Sunday

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Settling the Score
programme.desc: Silent assassin Bruce Kalman has unfinished business to attend to, while young hot-shot Jordan Andino is out to prove he's come a long way since his last match with Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: So Many Obstacles

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: White Wolf of Newfoundland
programme.desc: Forrest teams up with a specialist in Newfoundland in search of the White Wolf, a predator that was declared extinct in 1930. They meet with a hunter that shot what is believed to be a wolf and uncover evidence that suggests the species could be alive.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Florida Black Panther
programme.desc: Forrest searches the Everglades for the black panther, a creature that's been rumoured to exist for years. Discoveries suggest there may be some truth in the rumours.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Galapagos Giant
programme.desc: Forrest is in the Galapagos seeking the Fernandina Tortoise, an animal that was only seen once, over 100 years ago. The clues are here, along with an abundance of incredibly unique species, raising hopes of a historic discovery.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Dracula Monkey of Borneo
programme.desc: Forrest returns to the volcanic islands of Indonesia to find the Millers Grizzled Langur, otherwise known as the Dracula monkey. When locals inform him of an illegal pet market, his search quickly evolves into a rescue mission.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: Recovered Evidence: The Madagascar Giant
programme.desc: Featuring all-new footage from Forrest's expeditions. Madagascar's Pachylemurs were red, furry giants, nearly the size of great apes. Recently discovered remains disprove that they went extinct 1000 years ago and Forrest scales the canopy of the jungle.

programme.title: Extinct or Alive: The Legendary Cape Lion
programme.desc: Forrest ventures home to Zimbabwe in search of the mysterious Cape Lion, a massive black-maned predator. He and the crew navigate the African bush determined to get DNA proof, facing threats of charging rhinos and huge prides of lions.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Deserts
programme.desc: Deserts cover one fifth of the planet and they are spreading every year. We think we are familiar with the Sahara and the Kalahari but what about the Gobi or the Atacama -so many deserts have hardly been explored.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ice Worlds
programme.desc: The Arctic and Antarctic experience the most extreme seasons on Earth. Time-lapse cameras watch a colony of penguins, while aerial images show a polar bear swimming more than 100 km.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests
programme.desc: From the evergreen forests of the frozen north to the deciduous dry forests of the Equator, discover the greatest woodlands on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep
programme.desc: In the ocean, life goes to extraordinary lengths to survive this immense realm. A 30-tonne whale shark gorges on a school of fish. Deep sea octopus fly in the abyss and vampire squid use bioluminescence to create a colour display.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Great Plains
programme.desc: After filming for three years, the shy Mongolian gazelle and the bizarre-looking Tibetan fox are captured on film. Over six weeks, the team follows a pride of 30 lions as they attempt to hunt elephants.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles cover roughly three per cent of our planet yet contain 50 per cent of the world's species. In the Ngogo forest, the largest chimpanzee group defends its territory from neighbouring groups. Other specialists include a parasitic fungi.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests

programme.title: Planet Earth: Ocean Deep

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Hidden World
programme.desc: In this first episode, we explore Singapore's hidden wilderness, overlooked areas of the island that are home to an astonishing variety of fascinating creatures.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Urban Wild
programme.desc: Moving beyond the wild parts of Singapore, Sir David Attenborough takes us through a day in the life of the wildlife residing in Singapore's urban environments, from civets taking up residence in roof cavities to pythons hunting in drains.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Islands
programme.desc: Head beneath the waves of Singapore's coast and islands to discover some of its aquatic animals, including the rare tiger tail seahorse, the powerful pistol shrimp and the dog-faced water snake.

programme.title: Wild Singapore: Forest Life
programme.desc: An exploration of Singapore's forests, which are home to some of the least known primates in the world, flying dragons, mating snakes, and many more.

programme.title: Life: Challenges of Life
programme.desc: Journey Earth to discover the extraordinary diversity of animals and plants that exists today and the most extreme stories of survival nature has to offer.

programme.title: Life: Reptiles and Amphibians
programme.desc: Reptiles and amphibians live on every continent except Antarctica. From icy wastelands to arid deserts, they outnumber mammals and birds, and their extraordinary forms and bizarre behaviour are constantly surprising.

programme.title: Life: Mammals
programme.desc: New techniques reveal previously unseen behaviour, both the huge spectacle and the remarkable intimacy of mammal life, in the most extreme locations on Earth.

programme.title: Life: Fish
programme.desc: Witness the secret and ferocious world of the great white and sailfish, the puffer fish and barracuda, in this extraordinary journey from open ocean to coral reef and from storm-ravaged surf zone to the abyssal depths.

programme.title: Life: Birds
programme.desc: Using specially developed aerial and underwater camera techniques to enter the world of birds, explore their incredible diversity and behaviour, and see these beautiful creatures in a whole new way.

programme.title: Life: Insects
programme.desc: Using the latest techniques and remote-controlled 'ant-cams', enter the world of armoured-plated insects, spiders and scorpions.

programme.title: Life: Hunters and Hunted
programme.desc: Explore the world of the carnivores, from cats and dogs to bears and dolphins that must make a kill in order to survive. To win, they must overcome the weapons, intelligence and speed of their prey.

programme.title: Life: Creatures of the Deep
programme.desc: A journey into the uncharted corners of the ocean where the newest discoveries are being made and where the strangest sea creatures can be found.

programme.title: Vegas Mafia
programme.desc: Built from scratch by the Mob, for decades Las Vegas has been a glittering cash cow for the bosses back in New York and Chicago.

programme.title: Biker Chicks: Leather and Lace
programme.desc: We take a look at the women who live, love and ride within the sexist and often violent world of the American outlaw bikers.

programme.title: Grand Canyon Skywalk
programme.desc: Get exclusive access to the construction of a man-made marvel suspended over one of Mother Nature's greatest wonders a horseshoe-shaped, glass-floored bridge that allows visitors to walk where eagles fly.

programme.title: Kingdom of the North: Land of Legends
programme.desc: Bison, bighorn sheep, polar bears, grizzlies, and more endure harsh conditions to survive.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: New Horizons
programme.desc: Alaskans must dig deep to harvest new resources in order to endure dark winter.

programme.desc: A family has built a fortress in case of economic collapse, but nature strikes and puts the foundation under immediate threat. An Alaskan man is preparing for a cataclysmic earthquake and the towering tsunami that could follow.

programme.title: Hyena Coast
programme.desc: Brown hyena expert Ingrid Wiesel journeys through Namibia's wild coast in search of her favorite study animal, named Tosca.

programme.title: Land of the Lemurs
programme.desc: Madagascar is a bizarre landscape of towering stone forests, giant baobab groves and dense tropical jungles. Endemic animals occupy every niche of this unique and diverse island nation, including over 100 species of weird and wonderful lemurs.

programme.title: Wild 24: The Devil's Island
programme.desc: From the forests to the waters, this is a snapshot of the extraordinary lives of Tasmania’s animals over 24 hours. This land south of the Australian mainland has an extraordinary variety of strange and bizarre creatures.

programme.title: Lemur Island
programme.desc: Two families of lemurs guide you through their wonderful world on the island of Madagascar. Along the way you'll see extraordinary flora and fauna and learn about the lives of lemurs.

programme.title: Namibia, Sanctuary of Giants: Mission Critical
programme.desc: A dedicated group of people work to protect refuges for Africa's iconic wildlife.

programme.title: Namibia's Skeleton Coast
programme.desc: The story of how some of the world's largest creatures survive in the inhospitable deserts of Namibia.

programme.title: Gabon: The Last Eden
programme.desc: In the jungles of Central Africa lies a vast wilderness where an ancient world is clashing with a modern one. A country the size of Colorado, Gabon is one of the last refuges for the endangered lowland gorilla.

programme.title: Africa's Wild West
programme.desc: Follow a population of wild horses who live in the desert along Namibia's west coast.

programme.title: Wild Botswana
programme.desc: Botswana's an epicenter for one of Earth's greatest wildlife spectacles.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Terror in Tacoma
programme.desc: After a giant suspension bridge begins to violently rock, it suddenly collapses, marking one of the most iconic engineering disasters of all time; using the latest science, experts reveal what went so catastrophically wrong at the Tacoma Narrows bridge.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Crash of the Titan
programme.desc: As one of the largest construction cranes in the world lifts a one-million-ton section of roof for Milwaukee's Miller Park stadium, it suddenly collapses. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Curse of the Devil's Dam
programme.desc: When a dam breaks during routine maintenance, engineers fear a catastrophic flood. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how a simple miscalculation could be to blame.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare in Florida
programme.desc: When a brand-new bridge suddenly collapses in Miami, several die in a horrifying calamity. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how an innovative bridge-building technique could be to blame.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Curse of the Swamp Monster
programme.desc: When an oil rig in Louisiana drills into something unexpected, a cataclysmic event is unleashed, causing a lake to suddenly disappear; experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Houston's Hurricane Hell
programme.desc: When Hurricane Harvey hits Houston, the city is overwhelmed by four feet of rain in four days, causing catastrophic flooding and billions of dollars in damage; experts use cutting-edge tech to discover what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Cruise Ship Catastrophe
programme.desc: When a cruise ship meets disaster, the ship begins to sink and the captain flees, leaving 300 passengers stranded; now, new discoveries reveal the fatal truth behind the devastating wreck that claimed 32 lives.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Houston's Hurricane Hell
programme.desc: When Hurricane Harvey hits Houston, the city is overwhelmed by four feet of rain in four days, causing catastrophic flooding and billions of dollars in damage; experts use cutting-edge tech to discover what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: Deadly Engineering: Cruise Ship Catastrophe
programme.desc: When a cruise ship meets disaster, the ship begins to sink and the captain flees, leaving 300 passengers stranded; now, new discoveries reveal the fatal truth behind the devastating wreck that claimed 32 lives.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Curse of the Swamp Monster
programme.desc: When an oil rig in Louisiana drills into something unexpected, a cataclysmic event is unleashed, causing a lake to suddenly disappear; experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Night of the Chupacabra
programme.desc: A camera captures footage of a Chupacabra-like beast. At an observatory on Hawaii's Mauna Kea, cameras record a mysterious explosion that looks like a nuclear bomb detonated in space. Video of spontaneous combustion is taken at a haunted bar.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Attack of the Fire Devil
programme.desc: A man is recorded surviving two lightning strikes in moments. Cameras spot strange lights in the sky in Norway, turning a remote area into a UFO hot spot. A bizarre glowing object is caught on tape at a museum, and some wonder if it's an alien artifact.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Ice Monster
programme.desc: A giant creature in an armor of ice is spotted in the Alaskan wild, and some suspect it's a deadly mythical monster. A jet has a close encounter with an unknown object. Evidence of a deadly lightning strike invites paranormal explanations.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Devil's Mutant
programme.desc: In Egypt, a freakish animal is caught on camera, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if this strange beast could explain the secrets of a satanic deity that was once believed to have been worshiped here.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. Two men carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: The story of how an unremarkable drifter from Vienna instigated the most devastating military conflict in the history of the world. Explore how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler he was a modern-day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, but discover what the reality was.

programme.title: Nazi Secret Files: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Holy Grail
programme.desc: Find out what The Holy Grail could have been, whether it was a cup from the Last Supper or used to cleanse Jesus’ body after the Crucifixion, and see where it could be today.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Societies: Mystery and Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigate if there's any truth to conspiracy theories that allege secret societies control the course of world history from behind-the scenes, and if true, new discoveries might finally reveal the extent of their global domination.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Billionaire Boys Club
programme.desc: Marcia dives into the world of greed, money and power to unweave the tangled web of ambition and lies that strangled The Billionaire Boys Club.

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Broken Home
programme.desc: In New Orleans, a young mother is ambushed at home and shot at close range. Detective Rob Barrere's case depends solely on the eyewitness account of a four-year-old girl and leads to another brutal death.

programme.title: The First 48: Missing Persons: The Good Mother
programme.desc: Nellie Litvinova disappeared a few hours after her daughter brought her home from a doctor's appointment.

programme.title: The First 48: The Detective Speaks: Murder in Treme
programme.desc: In New Orleans, when a woman is slashed to death, the investigation into her murder leads Dets. Chuck Ward and Rob Barrere to a house of horrors, and they discover the killer may be someone they least expected.

programme.title: The First 48: Missing Persons: Mother's Day/ Somebody Knows
programme.desc: Detectives hit the streets in search of a 48-year-old woman whose two grown daughters fear she is the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Chandra Levy
programme.desc: Marcia Clark examines the mysterious death of Chandra Levy, the Washington DC intern who had an alleged affair with United States Congressman, Gary Condit. With no one held accountable for Chandra's brutal murder, Marcia investigates what really happened.

programme.desc: It's a full moon in New Orleans, and sure enough, all night long, the calls for the EMTs seem to get crazier and crazier. There's a machete hacking, a man whose finger is bitten off by a dog and a guy stabbed by a man dating his ex-wife.

programme.title: Nightwatch: After Hours: Fallen Brother
programme.desc: The city is in mourning after a well-loved Police officer is shot and killed on duty.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Cartel City
programme.desc: The team's K-9 sniffs out a package with black tar heroin hidden inside a child's teddy bear.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: A River Runs Through It
programme.desc: A woman drives with 60 pounds of dope in her car trunk while her daughter sleeps in the backseat.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Fifty Tons
programme.desc: A local casino's connection to a prostitution ring may give detectives the chance to hurt the cartels.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: A Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: With a large shipment of heroin about to arrive in Laredo, the LPD team conducts a citywide crackdown of suspected heroin dealers to learn where and when the drugs will arrive.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: The Candyman
programme.desc: A series of controlled buys leads detectives to the house of a local dealer.

programme.title: Bordertown: Laredo: Third Time's a Charm
programme.desc: Detectives are determined to take down Quack, one of Laredo's most notorious heroin dealers.

programme.title: Crime 360: Killing Spree
programme.desc: After two men are shot, detectives follow the clues that lead them to a serial robber they've been tracking. After a third shooting results in death, the detectives work quickly to find this robber turned serial killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Knock Knock
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly when two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head. When the witnesses are unable to provide any solid leads, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team dig into his past and start to suspect someone in William's circle is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: George Ferribee, a loving son led astray by addiction, is found executed. When Lt. Joe Kenda learns the victim had recently been kidnapped, he assumes the crimes are related... but soon discovers things are much more complicated than he had expected.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Setup
programme.desc: Hardworking family man Douglas Warren stumbles into a downtown bar with a gunshot wound to the neck and bleeds out on the floor. To catch the killer, Kenda must conduct a risky sting operation and launch an interstate manhunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Follow the Money
programme.desc: The body of a 72-year-old man is found in junkyard, stabbed 13 times and wearing nothing but his underwear and dentures. When investigators discover a trail of purchases made with the victim's credit card, they hope it will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Confession
programme.desc: After a husband and wife are viciously attacked in their own home, Kenda is on the hunt for a troubled teen whose appetite for violence knows no bounds. Then an unprecedented discovery spurs police to open up a century old murder investigation.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Lady in Red
programme.desc: A woman in red drops a dying man off at a firehouse and then vanishes. Police soon learn the victim is a contractor with a troubled personal life, but identifying the mystery woman is the hurdle they must overcome in order to bring him justice.

programme.title: Shattered: Do You Know My Voice?
programme.desc: Linda Hardin is convinced Grant is the perfect husband. In 2017, when he's arrested for murder, Linda believes police have the wrong man. Then officers show up at her door with evidence of another crime and her devotion is put to the test.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. As days go by with no sign of the baby or demands for ransom, sergeants Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she's been sold on the black market or worse.

programme.desc: After a husband and wife are viciously attacked in their own home, Kenda is on the hunt for a troubled teen whose appetite for violence knows no bounds. Then an unprecedented discovery spurs police to open up a century old murder investigation.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Picture of Evil
programme.desc: A picture-perfect dinner for two dissolves into a nightmare for University of Arkansas at Pine Bluff sophomore and cheerleader Dominique 'Nicky' Hurd and a fellow classmate after they become the targets of a deranged predator.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Desert Drifter
programme.desc: Three teenage boys looking for adventure in the peaceful and secluded high desert of California's Indian Creek run into a drifter with a mission to kill.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Knives and Lies
programme.desc: When a well-liked teenage boy is found stabbed to death in his Salt Lake City, UT home, detectives leave no stone unturned in their quest to solve the murder that rocked this normally tranquil town.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Kill Now, Pay Later
programme.desc: When an arrest is made in the contract killing of a California businessman, police discover that's just the beginning of the story.

programme.title: Unusual Suspects: Murder in the Mirror
programme.desc: When a beloved matriarch is found murdered in her Hubbardston, Michigan home, investigators cast a suspicious eye on friends and neighbors, determined to solve the small town's first homicide.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Raging Son
programme.desc: Go inside the investigation into the death of Weight Watchers executive Danielle Thomas and the murder case against Wall Street attorney Jason Bohn.

programme.title: 48 Hours Mystery: Dangerous Reunion
programme.desc: An old classmate turned killer targets former cheerleaders.

programme.title: 48 Hours Mystery: Deadly Proposal
programme.desc: Correspondent Peter Van Sant investigates a murder involving a college professor.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: A flight attendant who never travels alone offers to break her own rule once for a quick trip to Detroit, but finds more than she bargained for in her hotel room.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Horror in the Heartland
programme.desc: Two teenagers in love go missing from rural Ohio. Ten days later, they both turn up dead - brutally hacked to bits. The crime tears the small town apart and remains unsolved for 25 years, until the shocking truth comes to light.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Psycho for Love
programme.desc: When Chanin Starbuck comes home to find her house has been vandalized, she fears her ventures in online dating are to blame.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The One That Got Away
programme.desc: Single mom Tracy is starting to turn her life around when she falls for attentive Jody. As his jealousy starts to overtake their relationship, she soon comes to realize she can run, but she can't hide.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secrets and Scandals
programme.desc: We all know Madison Square Garden as the world's most famous arena, and are well aware of the crime and corruption that surrounded prohibition bootlegging. Host Joe Moniaci exposes the secrets and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Fighting for Freedom
programme.desc: We've all heard the phrase 'go for broke,' remember the Fall of Saigon as Vietnam's bitter end, have listened to the legends spun around top-secret microfilm, and have seen the classic movie, 'the Dirty Dozen.' Here's what you haven't heard.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Breaking the Rules
programme.desc: We all know the significance of the Civil War, the CIA, the Civil Rights movement, and the advent of flight. There are many more rules that were broken to forge the American spirit that we don't know about. Joe Moniaci reveals what history forgot.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Rebels With a Cause
programme.desc: Rosa parks was not the first African American women to refuse to give up her seat. The Berlin Airlift included candy for kids. One of the great rifles used in war was invented by a man who made moonshine.

programme.title: Capturing Bin Laden
programme.desc: Capturing bin Laden tracks the rise and fall of Osama bin Laden, a man who spent the decade following the September 11 attacks at the top of America's most wanted list.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather
programme.desc: The hideously mutilated body of a DEA agent sparks the largest manhunt in the Drug Enforcement Administration's history. It would take a special unit of investigators, and a battalion of Mexican soldiers to bring the killers to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Jesse James: The South's Last Rebel
programme.desc: The life and exploits of outlaw Jesse James are recounted.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Billy the Kid: The Phantom of Lincoln County
programme.desc: On a bloodstained frontier where corruption is king, an unlikely hero becomes a crusader for justice and revenge. By the time of his death at the age of 21, everyone in the country had heard of Billy the Kid.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Bringing Back the Bath
programme.desc: Rob and his crew pull out all the stops to make the master bathroom one for the history books. A custom stretch ceiling takes the space to new heights, while a gold-plated bathtub is a feast for the eyes.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Racing to the Reveal
programme.desc: With the open house days just away, Rob and the crew are putting the pedal to the metal to finish their most epic renovation to date.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Kicking Hot Pink to the Curb
programme.desc: Rob and the ninjas tackle a rundown property in an up-and-coming neighborhood in Wellington, Florida. Their budget is on a dime and they've got limited time, so they roll up their sleeves and add some VIP luxuries to transform this hot pink eyesore.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Adding Spice to the Kitchen and Living Room
programme.desc: Rob plans to spice up the kitchen and living room at his latest Wellington project by installing new bamboo flooring, appliances and real wood cabinets. The cherry on top is when the ninjas turn the dated and hated wet bar into a one-of-a-kind love seat.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: A Five-Star Master Suite
programme.desc: Rob and the ninjas take care of business by adding fresh paint and wallpaper to the master bedroom, a customized built-in closet and a wow-worthy master bath all on a tight budget.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Backyard TLC
programme.desc: The backyard at Rob's Wellington project has a ton of potential but the overgrown plants are blocking the view. By extending the patio, trimming trees and adding some TLC, the backyard is back and better than ever.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Upstairs Battle
programme.desc: Rob and the ninjas tackle a rundown property in an up-and-coming neighborhood in Wellington, Florida. The stairwell and upstairs bedrooms and bathrooms are hurtin' for certain, so Rob and the ninjas give them the VIP treatment.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Garage Goals
programme.desc: Rob and the ninjas hit the refresh button when they upgrade the dining room and garage in the Wellington house. They dress up the walls with wallpaper and art to give these spaces a brand new start.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: No Bones About It
programme.desc: Police are called to investigate after Michael makes a startling discovery at The City Barn. Then, Mike shows The Toxic Townhouse's owners the structural issues and dangerous gas line.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Bringing the Heat
programme.desc: Mike and the team install a new furnace at The Toxic Townhouse, replacing the decade-old gas fireplace the homeowners were using to heat the home. Then, The City Barn owners are welcomed home with a reveal that takes their breath away.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Log Jam
programme.desc: Mark hires a family friend to build a custom log house for him to retire in. The budget has been maxed out and the home isn’t done, so he sends out an SOS that Mike Holmes answers.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Broken Record
programme.desc: Mike and his team come to the rescue of Sheila and Val, a couple scammed out of their money, their kitchen and their trust by a notorious contracting criminal who would occasionally do one good job to lure other unsuspecting clients.

programme.title: Amazing Spaces: Transformation in Milford, Ct
programme.desc: At a home in historic Milford, CT, Eric and his team open up the dusty, unused attic and turn it into a loft creating extra space for the couple's needs. Additionally, Eric removes the old staircase and replaces it with a spiral staircase.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin Wanderlust
programme.desc: A young cabin builder creates a one-of-a-kind cabin in upstate New York during the harsh winter months. Due to the new and complicated design, the crew must adapt to the environment, work efficiently and leave no room for mistakes.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaiian Hideaway
programme.desc: Innovative designer and builder Graham Hill sets out to transform a steep Maui jungle plot into a 600-square-foot, hi-tech dream home with multiple moving walls and other space-maximizing features.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Volcano Home
programme.desc: A couple builds a rainforest retreat within the edge of an active volcano on Hawaii's Big Island.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Yellowstone River
programme.desc: The Lighthiser family sets out to build their dream home overlooking the Yellowstone River. Follow their journey as the activists and adventurers battle the elements to construct an uber-efficient house in a windswept valley in southwestern Montana.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Coastal Maine
programme.desc: Jason and Crystal always wanted an escape in the middle of Maine's secluded coastline for their family to unplug and enjoy nature. With the help of a small group of friends, they set their sights on building a 320-square-foot cabin in just 12 days.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Lighthouse
programme.desc: After witnessing the demise of Casco Bay's Halfway Rock lighthouse, Ford Reiche has the chance to return this icon to its former glory. It will take barges full of scaffolding, masons, and the cooperation of Mother Nature.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Garage Door Greatness
programme.desc: With the Minnehaha house still sitting on the market, Nicole decides to put her own house up for sale in hopes that it will sell faster. But before she can do this she gives her garage a much-needed makeover and removes asbestos from her basement.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Unfinished-Finished Basement
programme.desc: Preparing to put her house up for sale, Nicole turns her attention to the cluttered basement and devises a plan to update the space while also keeping the unfinished, industrial feel it would have had when the house was built.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Tale of Two Houses
programme.desc: Nicole is back in action and juggling two Detroit houses at the same time. While the Ferndale house is in great shape, the 14 Mile property is gutted of its original fixtures and charm. Ferndale serves as the inspiration for renovations at 14 Mile.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Close Quarters
programme.desc: Nicole tackles a 1920s house that used to be a rental and has incredibly small upstairs bedrooms. She plans to change the layout and add character, including removing a wall to make room for a new hallway and custom linen closet.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Bath Miracle
programme.desc: Nicole finds that turning a tiny, dated bathroom into an en suite master bath isn't easy as she struggles to fit a soaking tub, shower and custom vanity in the space to give it stately, historic appeal.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Maximizing the Master Suite
programme.desc: Nicole has almost completed the upstairs in her 14-Mile house. Now it's to time to unveil a bigger and brighter master bedroom. To get the look she wants, she has to knock down some walls, open up the ceiling and bring in a very special feature.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Chowin' Down In Portland
programme.desc: Food blogger, Ali Khan, has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Portland.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Eating Vermont
programme.desc: Ali kicks things off with a local favorite for breakfast in Burlington, Vermont.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Philly Food Fight
programme.desc: Ali Khan is hunting for the best deals in Philadelphia for breakfast, lunch and dinner.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: A Buzz in Brooklyn
programme.desc: Ali Khan is in Brooklyn to find the best deals for breakfast, lunch and dinner.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Hot, Charred and Crispy
programme.desc: Cooking Channel's Haylie Duff joins Michael Symon at one of his most treasured New Orleans spots.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Slammin' Hot and Smoky
programme.desc: In Asheville, N.C., Michael Symon digs into a slammin' sandwich with three different cuts of pork smothered in triple-cheese sauce.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent Regional Dishes
programme.desc: Baton Rouge, La. native and Food Network Star finalist, Jay Ducote, joins Michael Symon for a French and Cajun-inspired burger with a twist.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Symon's Cleveland 'que
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, Ohio, at his very own restaurant where he enjoys a tender, juicy and hulking pastrami beef rib and a gets a special look at his grandfather's recipe for scratch-made spaetzle and spicy sauerkraut.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fireside Hangs
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is hanging out with two chefs putting a whole new spin on rotisserie cooking in the great outdoors. At SpringHouse restaurant in Alexander City, Ala., Chef Rob McDaniel has designed a fire-fueled contraption that he and Roger use to roast.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Florida Fixins
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Florida fanning the flames for something savory and something sweet. Roger heads to Hamaknockers Bar-B-Que in Crawfordville, where a young pitmaster pulls pork with a power tool!

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Tacos
programme.desc: Americans love tacos, and Roger Mooking is scouring the country for the 15 best tacos around. The options for fillings range from pork to fish to alligator in hard, soft and even puffy shells.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quito
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the diverse culinary classics of Ecuador's capital city, Quito. The urban cuisine satisfies stomachs with fried pork and potato cakes, fresh ceviche, sugar-coated roasted peanuts, fish soup and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Town
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern leaves no meal unexplored in multicultural Cape Town, South Africa, where meat comes in all forms, from sausage to stew to pie. The coastal city's seafood is out of this world, and the favorite pastry is nothing without a coat of syrup!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Trinidad And Tobago
programme.desc: Andrew samples the island flavors and culinary mashups of Trinidad and Tobago. These islands have a passion for food and life, featuring dishes like curried crab with dumplings, crispy fried shark sandwiches and soft and silky flatbreads.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dallas
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the big and bold flavors that are decidedly Dallas. From comforting chicken fried steak and sweet, creamy pecan pie to hearty tortilla soup and steak aged for 240 days.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Vulture
programme.desc: A detective from Special Crimes takes over Jake's nearly solved murder case and steals his thunder. Over a few drinks, Jake enlists the precinct to get revenge and find the murder weapon before 'The Vulture' does.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine: The Slump
programme.desc: Jake has a slew of unsolved cases that he can't seem to close, and the other detectives don't want his losing streak to rub off on them. Meanwhile, Holt asks Amy to run lead on the Junior Policeman Program for at-risk youth.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the '90s Horse Party
programme.desc: Caroline and Max throw a '90s themed party at the diner to attract rich hipsters and raise money for their cupcake business. Caroline is horrified when her rich ex-boyfriend comes into the diner.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And Hoarder Culture
programme.desc: Caroline and Max are waist-deep in clutter when they clean a hoarder's apartment. Meanwhile, Max discovers that Johnny has been keeping a secret from her.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the College Experience
programme.desc: When Caroline and Max are invited to speak about their business at Caroline's alma mater, Max takes the opportunity to give Caroline the college partying experience she never had. Also, Oleg's attempts to bond with baby Barbara are rebuffed by Sophie.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Rom-Commie
programme.desc: Earl becomes concerned he may not be able to keep up when his long-lost sweetheart visits from Cuba and wants him to take her sightseeing. Also, Max must decide whether it's time to take her texting relationship with Randy to the next level.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Sophie Doll
programme.desc: When the girls take a bartending class in order to add cocktails to their dessert bar menu, Caroline must think quickly when she has to take the class exam solo after Max gets chicken pox. Also, Sophie creates a creepy lookalike video monitor doll.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: A Job for Robert
programme.desc: Ray becomes jealous when Marie starts treating Robert better than him. Ray finds out that Marie gave Robert a gift basket full of lotions, massage oil, candles, etc.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: A Date for Peter
programme.desc: Concerned by Peter's being single, Amy's parents ask Ray to give him some dating advice.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Favors
programme.desc: Marie helps Debra deal with Ray, who always leaves his belongings lying around the house.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Faux Pas
programme.desc: Ray can't believe that the family is so upset about what he said to his sons' friend.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Tasteless Frank
programme.desc: Marie believes she has lost her touch in the kitchen when Frank puts salt on his lasagna.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Masseuse
programme.desc: Jerry yearns for a massage from his new girlfriend; Elaine worries about her boyfriend.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Cigar Store Indian
programme.desc: Kramer pitches his idea for a coffee table book on coffee tables. Elaine loses Mr. Costanza's TV Guide during a subway ride. Elaine's Native American friend thinks Jerry is insensitive when he gives Elaine a cigar-store Indian statue.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Conversion
programme.desc: George converts to the Latvian Orthodox religion to keep his girlfriend. Jerry finds a tube of fungus cream in his girlfriend's medicine cabinet and fakes an illness until he can figure out what the cream is used for.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Stall
programme.desc: Elaine agonizes over a woman's refusal to pass her some toilet paper in the restroom.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where They All Turn Thirty
programme.desc: The gang reflects on their goofy experiences when they celebrate Rachel's 30th birthday.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Joey's New Brain
programme.desc: A soap opera diva becomes romantically involved with Joey; Rachel and Phoebe compete.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Truth About London
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler fondly recall how their relationship changed during the London trip.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Cheap Wedding Dress
programme.desc: Monica has to fight a fellow bride-to-be for a unique wedding dress.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Joey's Award
programme.desc: Joey is happy to be nominated for a 'Soapie,' the third most prestigious daytime TV award.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross and Monica's Cousin
programme.desc: The arrival of Ross and Monica's cousin causes serious distractions for all the men.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Big Kiss
programme.desc: Rachel wonders if she should confront her sorority sister about a drunken college kiss.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Vows
programme.desc: With only four weeks left before the wedding, Chandler is still struggling with his vows.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Chandler's Dad
programme.desc: Monica arranges a face-to-face meeting between Chandler and his estranged father.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Monica and Chandler's Wedding
programme.desc: Chandler goes missing when he experiences 'cold feet' on the eve of his and Monica's wedding.

programme.title: American Dad!: Max Jets
programme.desc: Roger announces that 'Max Jets,' a character of Roger's who enjoys showering the Smith family with money, is soon getting out of prison. But a wrench is thrown in the system when Max falls in love with Gina.

programme.title: American Dad!: Naked to the Limit, One More Time
programme.desc: Roger pretends to be Jeff's imaginary friend so he can freely roam naked around the house with no disguise. But when big-mouth Jeff figures out that Roger is an alien, Stan issues an ultimatum: either Roger or Jeff must be killed immediately.

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: Zeppelin 1: Waterfalls/ Zeppelin 2: Atoll
programme.desc: Riding with Quincy Queztalcoatlus; Annie and her herd migrate to follow food.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat Knows a Lot About Space!
programme.desc: The Cat in the Hat goes on a cosmic adventure through the solar system to assist with Operation Rover Repair.

programme.title: Odd Squad: Drop Gadget Repeat/ 20 Questions
programme.desc: The agents try to escape from a time loop; a villain sets off a backwards bubble.

programme.title: BBC World News: America
programme.desc: BBC correspondent Katty Kay anchors BBC AMERICA's award-winning hour-long, U.S.-targeted nightly newscast.

programme.title: Nightly Business Report
programme.desc: In-depth financial market coverage, including fast-breaking business and economic news.

programme.title: PBS NewsHour
programme.desc: An analysis of current events with a news summary, discussions, and news features.

programme.title: Cycle of Health
programme.desc: Physicians bring to life compelling stories of how physical and emotion well being is just as effective in delivering good health as exercise and diet. Stories shared about people pursuing healthy and happy lives.

programme.title: Second Opinion: Taking Charge of Your Health Care: Rheumatoid Arthritis
programme.desc: Treatments that can halt destruction of the body from Rheumatoid arthritis are discussed.

programme.title: Death in Paradise: A Dash of Sunshine
programme.desc: When an English tourist is found strangled in her villa, evidence points to a robbery gone wrong. However, Richard believes there's more to the crime.

programme.title: The Doctor Blake Mysteries: By the Southern Cross
programme.desc: Mattie's communist friends form university descend on Ballarat to cause trouble when Mattie's father is speaking. One of the agitators is found dead and Blake looks for evidence. Mattie suspects Charlie is spying on Blake for Superintendent Monroe.

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: In-depth conversations with global thought leaders and cultural influencers.

programme.title: This Old House Hour: Westerly Return to Paradise; Women's Repair Class, Garden
programme.desc: Staircase is built. Kevin visits Idea House. Tom and Jeff work on the main staircase. Richard tours a factory to see how a furnace is built. Tom checks out a women’s only DIY class; Jenn plants a terraced garden.

programme.title: Independent Lens: Decade of Fire
programme.desc: In the 1970s, the Bronx was on fire. Revealing the real reasons for the devastation and shows what can happen when a community chooses to fight back and reclaim their neighborhood.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots: Black Like Me
programme.desc: Bryant Gumbel, Tonya Lewis-Lee and Suzanne Malveaux discover a tapestry of the unexpected in their ancestry, revealing slaves and free people of color, Civil War legacies, and forgotten European origins.

programme.title: Life From Above: Patterned Planet
programme.desc: Discover the weird and wonderful shapes that cover Earth’s surface as seen from space. The Australian outback is covered in pale spots thanks to digging wombats, and hundreds of elephants tear into the endless green of the Congo forest canopy.

programme.title: Nature: Okavango: River of Dreams - Inferno
programme.desc: Discover the landscape and wildlife of the Lower Okavango River, where the land is baked dry by the scorching sun. Large herds of zebra and wildebeest migrate to the dry plains in search of the precious salt that these animals need.

programme.title: Nova: Dead Sea Scroll Detectives
programme.desc: Scientists investigate suspicious, newly surfaced fragments to see if they're forfeited, and use imaging techniques to digitally unravel the charred remains of a scroll.

programme.title: Sit and Be Fit: Variety: The Spice of Life
programme.desc: Mary Ann combines a variety of exercises that improve function including a new exercise that uses the fingers and breath to control abdominal muscles.

programme.title: Arthur: All Thumbs/ Kidonia
programme.desc: Arthur catches Buster sucking his thumb. Later, Arthur and the gang decide to invent their own country: Kidonia.

programme.title: Ready Jet Go!: Mindy Turns Five
programme.desc: Mindy has finally turned five and the kids convince her to have her tea party on the moon.

programme.title: Nature Cat: Stop and Hear the Cicadas/ Cold-Blooded

programme.title: Splash and Bubbles: The House Hunt/ Dolphin Games
programme.desc: Splash, Bubbles and their best friends Dunk and Ripple go on epic adventures.

programme.title: Molly of Denali: Eagle Egg Hunt/ Dream Tube
programme.desc: A gust of wind spins a wildlife camera away from an eagle’s nest on hatching day. Molly and friends have their eye on a spectacular water tube for sale at the Trading Post, but they don’t have enough money to buy it.

programme.title: Curious George: Curious George's Amazon Adventure/ Monkey Senses

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!: Andy's Big Show/ Leo Moves It
programme.desc: Follow the hilarious adventures of three friends; Leo, Carmen, and Andy.

programme.title: Peg + Cat: The Camp Problem/ The Two Homes Problem

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood: Daniel and Margaret Play School/ Treasure Hunt at the Castle
programme.desc: Daniel Tiger and the children in the Neighbourhood of Make-Believe learn life lessons.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Sesame Friendship
programme.desc: Big Bird's block castle accidentally gets knocked down.

programme.title: Pinkalicious & Peterrific: Whale of a Song/ Pinkabubbles
programme.desc: The Pinkerton family is going whale watching with Captain Jolly. While at sea they discover a lost baby whale. Will Pinkalicious' whale song succeed in calling out to its mommy one of Pinkville's great pink whales?

programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Pies and Tarts
programme.desc: The remaining bakers face custard tarts followed by mini pear pies. The contestants battle their biggest bake yet; three-tiered pieces. Plus, the bakers must create a towering collection of pies in just four hours.

programme.title: Glenn Miller Swing Celebration Featuring The USAF Band

programme.desc: Burgess and Roman tackle a dangerous smuggling operation with no means to defend themselves or call for help. Meanwhile, it's a slow day in intelligence and they are spending the day receiving taser certification.

programme.title: Martin: No Justice, No Peace

programme.title: Martin: Suspicious Minds

programme.title: Martin: Love Is in Your Face (Part One)

programme.title: Martin: Love Is in Your Face (Part Two)

programme.title: Martin: Arms Are for Hugging
programme.desc: Martin and Gina admit that they are fighting and arguing too much, so they seek the help of a church Minister for counselling.

programme.title: Martin: Yours, Mine and Ours

programme.title: Living Single: Working Nine to Nine-Fifteen
programme.desc: Max gets her old job back, then quits; Overton and Regine think a neighbour is a killer.

programme.title: Living Single: Bristle While You Work
programme.desc: Khadijah and Regine clash while working on an ad campaign.

programme.title: Living Single: School Daze
programme.desc: Overton joins Synclaire's art history class.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Stress Related
programme.desc: Will's cure for Hilary's cold backfires when she falls asleep and misses a meeting.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Bourgie Sings the Blues

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Script Formerly Known As...
programme.desc: Will and Hilary interview a dismissed juror from Philip's case on Hilary's show.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Not I Barbecue
programme.desc: Will and Carlton get caught in a compromising position with two sexy intellectuals.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Not With My Cousin You Don't
programme.desc: Ashley wants to have sex with a longtime friend, but Will and Carlton have other plans.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Viva Lost Wages
programme.desc: When Will and Carlton go to Las Vegas, one of them gambles away their tickets home.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: There's the Rub (Part 1)
