programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: There's the Rub (Part 2)
programme.desc: Hilary and Carlton learn the true meaning of Thanksgiving while serving food to homeless.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Ooh Baby, Baby
programme.desc: Feeling unfulfilled despite her TV debut, Hilary announces that she wants to have a baby.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Boxing Helena
programme.desc: The whole family joins a health club and Will gets beaten up by a female boxer.

programme.title: Movie: Sharing Christmas
programme.desc: A real estate developer is given the opportunity to transform an old shopping complex into a prime location. Unfortunately, there is one tenant who is holding out, the Christmas shop owner he met just days earlier.

programme.title: Movie: Pride, Prejudice and Mistletoe
programme.desc: A career-driven woman finds her life turned upside down when she is forced to return to her hometown to care for her sick mother.

programme.title: Movie: Merry and Bright
programme.desc: Two people work together to make their candy-cane factory profitable, but in the end, it's their love that turns a profit.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Pemberley Manor
programme.desc: A rookie party planner works with a serious and all-business to put together a Christmas festival with help from a merrily enigmatic caretaker who looks like Santa. As the festival approaches, the spirit of the holidays may lead to a wish of love.

programme.title: Movie: It's Christmas, Eve
programme.desc: A school superintendent is forced to make cutbacks during the holiday season. A chance encounter leads her to meet a man and his young daughter, which leads to an unexpected romance, and a new song for her repertoire.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at Holly Lodge
programme.desc: A woman inherits the Evergreen Inn and Ski Lodge from her parents and starts a new tradition of spending every holiday there. While visiting she meets a family that will change her life.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Incorporated
programme.desc: Riley miraculously lands an assistant position with a headstrong, wealthy entrepreneur. He is being forced to play Scrooge and close one of his factories weeks before Christmas. Riley convinces him to visit the town, and hatches a plan.

programme.title: Movie: My Christmas Love
programme.desc: A hopeless romantic who can't seem to give a guy a real chance begins receiving '12 Days of Christmas' gifts anonymously at door. She begins to believe that the mystery suitor could live up to her expectations.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Made to Order
programme.desc: A Christmas amateur finds himself in charge of his family's holiday celebration. Desperate for help, he enlists an expert in all things Christmas and together, they discover what's truly important in life.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Television host and author Mike Rowe and 'Wrapped Up in Christmas' author Janice Lyn stops by. Then, chef Jessica Roy cooks upside down chicken.

programme.title: Movie: A December Bride
programme.desc: An aspiring interior designer is dreading the wedding of her cousin, who is marrying her ex-fiancé. She accepts an offer to go with a friend, the one responsible for introducing the soon-to-be bride and groom.

programme.title: Movie: A Gift to Remember
programme.desc: An accident between a sweet bookshop worker and a handsome stranger leaves him without his memory.

programme.desc: Meet this season’s newest Military Makeover family. The Wojcik's, of Strum, Wisconsin.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Paradise
programme.desc: Two families looking to escape bad holiday memories take a vacation to an exotic Caribbean island over Christmas. Dan and his two daughters and Dana and her two sons meet as the cruise ship docks in Puerto Rico.

programme.title: Movie: All About Christmas Eve
programme.desc: A party planner has to decide between a romantic vacation and the biggest event of her career.

programme.title: Movie: Merry In-Laws
programme.desc: A woman says yes to her boyfriend's marriage proposal without knowing that her soon-to-be in-laws are Mr. And Mrs. Claus.

programme.title: Movie: A Very Merry Toy Store
programme.desc: Two competing toy store owners face adversity when a big-box toy store opens in town. Now, they must overcome their differences to try to save their individual stores in time for the Christmas shoppers.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Illinois police discover a footprint on a birthday card that could lead to the home invader who killed a man and attacked two young girls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Can a map tell who a serial killer really is?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold
programme.desc: A family realizes that their health problems could be related to an uninvited 'guest.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: A Chemist suddenly starts to suffer from foot pain, partial numbness, and hair loss. He was initially mis-diagnosed. Investigators started searching the lab he worked in and interrogated some co-workers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Core Evidence
programme.desc: When a 16-month-old baby dies, tests discover e. coli in her system. Eventually the bacteria are traced back to a fruit juice manufacturer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Video Diary
programme.desc: When a gas station/ convenience store employee is found shot at point blank range, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's videotape security camera.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pure Evil
programme.desc: In 1993, two Texas teenagers, a 14-year-old boy and his 13-year-old stepsister, were brutally murdered. It took forensic evidence and a behavioral profile to identify their killer as Jason Massey, who had a history of torturing animals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Evidence
programme.desc: A couple was murdered during what looked like a drug deal gone awry. But police found no drugs in the home of the victims and there were no traces of the victims' blood on the clothing of the suspects. The victim's dog eventually led police to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Something's Killing Me: Fatal Inheritance
programme.desc: Dr. Bill Lidner collapses just hours after returning home from a family trip overseas. His young daughters find him bleeding on the stairs of their Ohio home. They didn’t know it then, but it is the first sign that something is very wrong.

programme.title: True Crime Live
programme.desc: Mike Galanos puts a spotlight on news and developments in criminal investigations.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Zodiac Killer: I Am The Zodiac
programme.desc: He terrorized Northern California in the late 1960s. He also taunted the public with cryptic clues, threats of violence and most famously, ciphers that were supposed to lead police to his identity, but mostly went nowhere.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Island From Hell
programme.desc: Jonathan Klay and Alison Teal are marooned on a Maldivian Island for 21 days.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Punishment in Panama
programme.desc: Clint Jivoin and Laura Zerra are Naked and Afraid on a Panamanian island for 21 days. Plagued by sand flies and threatened by snakes and crocodiles the pair have to stick together using all their skills and experience to survive in the tropical hell.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Fire on the Mountain
programme.desc: Avid outdoorsman Trenton and novice survivalist Jen take on high elevation in the peaks of Udhampur, India. With relentlessly cold nights and an unexpected wildfire, their chances of surviving the 21-day challenge might go up in flames.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Argentina Impossible
programme.desc: A survival instructor teams up with a pediatrician to fight storms, cold and starvation in Argentina's Yungas Cloud Forest. It's a race against time as the pair puts their skills to the test before hypothermia shuts them down.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Damned in Africa
programme.desc: It's kill or be killed as survivalists Jeff and Eva journey to Madagascar and take on the unforgiving Massif D'Isalo, a nasty boa constrictor, abundant black widows and harsh desert landscape.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: When Hunger Strikes
programme.desc: An endurance athlete and a self-proclaimed 'King of the Forest' tackle the backwoods of Alabama. A trucker and a stay-at-home mom join forces to survive in the Philippines and two survivalists fight the cold for three weeks in the Himalayan foothills.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Creepy Critters
programme.desc: A mom and a loner are challenged to survive and compete with monkeys and rats for food. Swarming wasps, deadly anacondas, poisonous toads and venomous stingrays surround the survivalists in Brazil. Deadly spiders and tics test two survivalists' courage.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Beware the Bayou
programme.desc: Billy Berger and Ky Furneaux are dropped in it up to their necks as they have to survive 21 days in the Louisiana swamp. They are washed out of their shelter by storms, must battle deadly snakes and avoid hungry alligators.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Boulder Battles
programme.desc: Fred's ex-boss Todd Hoffman has invested $50,000 in the Dakota Boy's operation. He infuriates Dustin, when he pays a surprise visit in a chopper.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Inland Tsunami
programme.desc: Fred gets married for the fourth time. A landslide upstream threatens to unleash a wall of water that could destroy the dive site and drown the miners.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Hypothermia
programme.desc: The Dakota Boys' desperate bid to hit bedrock gold is thwarted when 73-year-old Fred's heating system fails mid-dive and he's overcome by the glacial Alaskan water.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: The Graboid
programme.desc: The Dakota Boys are digging down to bedrock gold but when they hit the biggest boulder of the season Dustin is forced to rig a new mechanical solution: the Graboid.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: End of Days
programme.desc: A flash flood racing down McKinley Creek threatens to kill the crew and destroy their operation, but the Dakota Boys still manage to find more gold than they've gotten all season.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Back in Action
programme.desc: Dakota Boys Dustin and Fred are back in Alaska with new equipment and an extended crew they hope will help make their dreams of striking it rich come true.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Doubling Down
programme.desc: A life-threatening malfunction in a crucial piece of equipment shakes the crew to their core. Later, the guys make a plan to double down with two dredges running concurrently.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Bears Love Gold
programme.desc: Winter is quickly approaching so the crew puts their money on a new piece of equipment that promises to increase productivity. Meanwhile, a rogue bear is terrorizing the camp and threatening the safety of the crew.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Late-Season Nerves
programme.desc: It's late in the season and Dustin is feeling nervous about the meager amount of gold in the box. Later, Fred leaves the operation in a huff after engaging in a difficult power struggle.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Diver In Distress
programme.desc: The Dakota Boys need to reach a nugget trap and Carlos gets pinned underwater in the process. After attempting to save the diver in distress, Dustin proposes a plan to build a dam that will prevent it from happening again.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Rookies and Rain Delays
programme.desc: Dustin makes a rookie mistake that causes Carlos to run out of fuel, stopping production. Later, heavy rains threaten to end the season even after a large nugget sparks hope within the crew.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Disaster and Devastation
programme.desc: The team races to rescue Dustin from raging waters after a landslide causes a flash flood. The aftermath of the disaster results in the crew's hard work being wiped out in minutes. Later, a waterfall promises to be a lucrative new mining site.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Pizza Delivery
programme.desc: Angel has planned every detail of her wedding, while Katie has planned a Rock Star-themed bash.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Love Lasso
programme.desc: Kale performs a dance during her ultra-modern affair and Jennifer is serenaded on her wedding cruise by her sorority sisters.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Latte

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: It Feels Good to be Home
programme.desc: Kanye says 'thank you' to Armenia by playing a surprise public concert there. Kim arranges a special stop in Jerusalem to have North baptized in Israel's oldest Armenian Church. Back in LA, everyone responds differently to having Caitlyn in their lives.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Vanity Unfair

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Last Straw
programme.desc: Kourtney tries to keep it together as Scott's behavior spirals out of control, but when he's photographed in France with another woman, Kourtney is not sure how much more she can take. Khloé decides she must meet Caitlyn face to face.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Three's Company
programme.desc: Scott feels pressure to make sure both Kourtney and his girlfriend Sofia are happy on a family trip to Finland. When North gets an opportunity to star in a video with one of her idols, Kim worries that her daughter will have performance anxiety.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Have You Met Kim?

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: Bread Winners

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Cook Like a Pro: Spicy
programme.desc: Some like it hot, and some like it spicy, so Ina Garten is making dishes to please both. She starts with an exotic lamb and chickpea curry made with a fragrant mix of spices, and her lobster corn fritters are paired with creamy sriracha sauce.

programme.title: Giada's Holiday Handbook: Friendsgiving Party
programme.desc: Giada hosts a cocktail-style Thanksgiving celebration to honor and thank her closest friends. The menu is filled with appetizer-sized versions of beloved holiday dishes, like stuffing arancini, turkey waldorf bites, and charred Brussels sprouts crostini.

programme.title: Tanked!: Boyz II Men to ATM
programme.desc: Brett and Wayde must design and build a custom tank inside an old fireplace for the founder of famed R&B group BOYZ II MEN. In North Carolina they build a huge octopus exhibit for the Greensboro Science Center.

programme.title: Tanked!: Party Rockin' Tank
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett make a tank for world famous artist and DJ Redfoo of the band LMFAO. The guys attempt their very first one-of-a-kind DJ booth aquarium.

programme.title: Tanked!: Fish City, Kid

programme.title: Tanked!: DJ of Dragons
programme.desc: World famous DJ Steve Aoki wants to get Tanked. But this job will be way harder than pressing play; Steve wants a custom, 3-headed dragon on the verge of escape inside his tank.

programme.title: Tanked: Sea-lebrity Edition: What Rhymes With Fish?
programme.desc: Rappers Lucadris and 2Chainz order exotic tanks worthy of these legendary Masters of Rhyme. 2Chainz flexes his hometown with an underwater Atlanta skyline, while Ludacris wants colorful 'ludafish' in his sophisticated tank.

programme.title: Tanked!: Triple Tank Throwdown!
programme.desc: Businessman Brad Jennings is building a new office and wants to top it off with three tanks from ATM.

programme.title: Tanked!: Wildfire Heroes Tank
programme.desc: Coddingtown Center in Santa Rosa have tasked the guys with a very special tank. To kick off their new remodel, they want Wayde and Brett to make a tank that pays respects to the heroes that helped the area during the recent wildfires.

programme.title: Tanked!: This Tank Is Ludacris!
programme.desc: Rapper and actor Ludacris is ready to get Tanked! He wants Brett and Wayde to build him a classy and sophisticated aquarium with lots of exotic fish! It's a race against the clock to get Ludacris his new aquarium.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Penny Hates Puck

programme.title: The Vet Life: A Tale of Two Tails
programme.desc: Dr. Blue has a crisis on his hands with a dog that has chewed off her own tail, while Dr. Ross treats a reptile that might need a tail amputation. Dr. Lavigne helps Sutter Butter, a cat rescued from being thrown out of a car, and is now having seizures.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Care for Bear
programme.desc: When a family's beloved dog is hit by a car, Dr. Jeff races to save him. Dr Amy treats a cherished Yorkie with a mysterious wound. Then, when a cat begins losing weight, Dr. Baier must find out why.

programme.title: The Zoo: Otter Under the Weather
programme.desc: Jasmine, a 14 year-old otter, is not her usual, energetic self. The staff of the New York Aquarium undertake a massive operation to move their sharks to a brand new exhibit. And the quirky capercaillies need help producing healthy chicks.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Baby Giraffe

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: Tia goes on a dangerous midnight rescue that leads her to chasing down a dog's mysterious origins. A cat threatens the chances of a Villalobos veteran finding a forever home. Finally, a Parolee puts his neck out to help a friend get a job.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Hero's Journey

programme.title: Family Guy: Foxx in the Men House

programme.desc: Deputy Keith Bergeron goes deep in the bayou to check out a report of someone burning trash, but finds himself outnumbered by several angry locals.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Catfish and Gators
programme.desc: When a vicious alligator attacks a dog, Deputy Melissa 'Catfish' Quintal calls in her alligator hunter boyfriend, Jacob Lirette, known as the 'Gator Man', to handle it. Also, deputies are sent in the dead of night to the eeriest bayous they've ever seen.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bone in My Swamp
programme.desc: Deputy Fitch heads to the docks to meet with a shrimper who believes he's caught a human bone in his shrimp net.

programme.title: Cajun Justice: Bug Off
programme.desc: Deputy Tom Arnold is called down the bayou to investigate a man disturbing his neighbours.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: Stuck
programme.desc: Two inmates suffer life-threatening stab wounds during a melee on the exercise yard that involves two rival gangs.

programme.title: The Squad: Prison Police: The Informant
programme.desc: An inmate risks his life and turns informant to help Sergeant Hampton and Special Agent John Fisher eliminate the inmates' outside drug source.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Christmas will never be the same for the two local residents of Noble, Oklahoma whose dog drops a human skull onto their front porch. After six years and no leads, the police must navigate the twists and turns of the victim's past to find redemption.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Branches of Evil
programme.desc: Tray Phelps, a beloved father, son and fiancée was found beaten to death in his own driveway. The small town of Hayti, Missouri is stunned to discover that a web of evil lurks just beneath the surface of the seemingly idyllic hamlet.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Bad for Business
programme.desc: Successful business owner MaryAnn Clibbery is brutally murdered at the remodeling business she owned in Loves Park, Illinois. The murder shocks the town. Then a suspicious bag found floating on the ice in the river unlocks the mystery of her slaying.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: If the Walls Could Talk
programme.desc: A quiet affluent retirement community in Monroe, Ohio is baffled when Barbara Howe simply vanishes one night. The police soon find her body in the trunk of her car, her throat slit. The hunt for her killer takes them back to an unlikely source.

programme.title: Shattered: In the Shadows of South Hill
programme.desc: In October 1980, one brave woman falls victim to the notorious South Hill rapist. While a desperate detective hunts down the vile attacker, another man has no idea that the suspect they're all looking for has been under his nose the entire time.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Beauty for Ashes
programme.desc: In 2016, 33-year-old Tricia Todd was reported missing after failing to pick up her daughter from a babysitter. As her family hoped and prayed, investigators found her online journal that revealed the true horror of what had happened.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: Murder for Sale
programme.desc: A top real estate agent in Little Rock, Arkansas fails to return home after showing a house to a client.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Firestarter
programme.desc: 20-year-old Audrey Mabrey is sure she has found Mr. Right when she connects with NYPD Detective Chris Hanney. But as the couple prepares for a life down in Florida, skeletons from their life in New York start to surface.

programme.title: The Object of Murder: Beauty for Ashes
programme.desc: In 2016, 33-year-old Tricia Todd was reported missing after failing to pick up her daughter from a babysitter. As her family hoped and prayed, investigators found her online journal that revealed the true horror of what had happened.

programme.title: Home Sweet Homicide: Murder for Sale
programme.desc: A top real estate agent in Little Rock, Arkansas fails to return home after showing a house to a client.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Firestarter
programme.desc: 20-year-old Audrey Mabrey is sure she has found Mr. Right when she connects with NYPD Detective Chris Hanney. But as the couple prepares for a life down in Florida, skeletons from their life in New York start to surface.

programme.title: Shattered: In the Shadows of South Hill
programme.desc: In October 1980, one brave woman falls victim to the notorious South Hill rapist. While a desperate detective hunts down the vile attacker, another man has no idea that the suspect they're all looking for has been under his nose the entire time.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home: Star-Crossed Murder
programme.desc: Air traffic controller Gene Thurnau moves to St-Petersburg, Florida, to start over. He meets Jaye-Jaye, and soon they marry and begin building their dream home. But ghosts from Gene's past bring unwanted tension and horror into their perfect home.

programme.title: A Stranger in My Home: Deadly Love Nest
programme.desc: Housemates Jenny, Jake, and Steve share everything, including each other's beds. But when one is brutally attacked, police uncover a nest of lies, jealousy, and betrayal. This leads them to ask: was it really an intruder… or was it an inside job?

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Good Fences Make Dead Neighbors
programme.desc: Instead of a brand new start, a man's move to Canyon Country, California, finds him locked in a bizarre and increasingly acrimonious eight year feud with his neighbor – that is finally resolved with blasts from a shotgun.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Homeowner Hell
programme.desc: A couple settles in Josephine County, Oregon, where they learn their new neighbor has a deadly past. Now, as relations sour and tempers flare, blood will be spilled on this land.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Kill-De-Sac
programme.desc: When a freewheeling family moves from California to the buttoned down enclave of Leesburg, Virginia, they quickly get on the wrong side of their neighbour across the way. The conflict escalates until bullets fly and blood flows in the street.

programme.title: Web of Lies: People You May Know
programme.desc: Single mom Lorianna Parker is excited when she meets popular good-looking Corey Davis online, and filled with hope as their friendship blossoms. But when she goes to meet him in the flesh, her dream date turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Bittersweet Sixteen
programme.desc: Angela Allen joins a social networking site where she soon falls in love. After weeks of texting, they decide to meet in person. Their first meeting seems to trouble Angela, but when she goes out for a second time, she never comes home.

programme.title: Web of Lies: With Friends Like These
programme.desc: A young girl has lewd photos of her taken at a party, with no memory of the night. Her world is turned upside down and the public shaming pushes her over the edge.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: Killer Colleagues
programme.desc: Zoe Pulver and Jane Long have great jobs working for Ashley Pollow, a talented tax attorney in Florida. But Ashley also has a violent temper, and when a grisly murder takes place at the office, Jane and Zoe find themselves way too close to the killer.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: A Fire Inside
programme.desc: When a serial arsonist murders four people in a California hardware store, fire investigators Marvin Casey and John Orr both become obsessed with the case. As fires continue to burn across the state, the two are pushed to their limits to stop the killing.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: The Devils Allure
programme.desc: Lonely widow Marilyn Burdick finally finds love again with Louis Plunkett, a charming real-estate agent. But Marilyn's only daughter Karen and her husband Jason doubt Louis' motivations and tension quickly escalates, triggering a deadly series of events.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: A Killer Hand
programme.desc: A teen embarks on a journey to bring justice to the killer of his family, but must succeed before someone else dies.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror
programme.desc: It's the most daring sting ever mounted by the FBI. On November 5th, 2002 agent Mark Kirby lures ruthless AUC terrorists out of their lair in the jungle and takes them down in a hotel car park in San Jose, Costa Rica.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Battle of Mortain
programme.desc: Hitler said, 'The coming battle would be the most decisive of the war.' Little did he know, that battle would be determined by a small group of National Guardsmen on top a hill, fighting to deny what Hitler wanted most: victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do
programme.desc: The noble warriors of Echo Company, 2nd Battalion, 4th Marines face down an overwhelming North Vietnamese Army in Dai Do and rescue their fellow Marines. Tattered, torn and depleted the men of Echo Company repeatedly deny the enemy its victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Magnificent Bastards of Dai Do

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Epic Inventions
programme.desc: On this special edition, learn the real story behind the most famous flying devices in history and the truth behind our most influential inventors.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Engineering America
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind the myths that surround our most revered patriotic symbols and we unveil the surprising facts of two great feats of engineering: the Panama Canal and the Transcontinental Railroad.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Striking it Rich
programme.desc: Discover the real facts behind America's biggest economic boom and biggest bust, and learn the truth behind some of Las Vegas' greatest myths.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Saluting the Truth
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we reveal the startling truth of two legendary generals, George Patton and Ulysses S. Grant. You'll also get a reality check on the roaring twenties and lawless thirties.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: The Great Escape
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, we uncover the real facts behind two legendary battles waged on American soil and we put the spotlight on great showmen to separate myth from truth.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Tales of Sea and Sky
programme.desc: We expose the truth behind the history on the high seas and we take wing to separate myth from truth about the nation's pioneering aviators.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.desc: Nicole Curtis continues work on the den and powder room of her 1920s 14-Mile house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: The Basement Blues
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis ventures down into the creepy basement of her 14-Mile project. She's then faced with a dilemma when an unforeseen turn of events threatens the entire project.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Cooking Up the Kitchen
programme.desc: Nicole begins construction in the kitchen of the 14 Mile house. Working with a limited space and no original details, she is forced to attempt something she has never done before: an open kitchen.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Adding Style to 14 Mile
programme.desc: As the renovation of the 14 Mile house winds down, there's one more thing that needs to be done: finish the exterior. After repairing damage from a car accident, Nicole has a chance to bring back original details the house lost decades ago.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bungalow Brickwork
programme.desc: Working to restore a 1920's bungalow, Nicole must tackle a ton of brickwork, including the need to rebuild the front steps after years of water damage.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Suite Madness
programme.desc: Nicole picks up where the old owner left off and creates a master suite in the attic.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Water Damaged Kitchen
programme.desc: Nicole repairs the water-damaged kitchen, keeping the original wall sink.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Everything We Had Leftover
programme.desc: To complete her bungalow rehab, Nicole must finish the remaining rooms.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Nicole's Grandparents' House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis takes on her most personal project ever: a 1950s ranch-style home her grandparents built by hand. She restores the kitchen to its original layout and transforms the dingy work basement into a party-ready rec room.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Mike Holmes and his kids tackle a renovation that has fallen off the tracks for expectant parents. Next Generation is on a time-sensitive mission to finish the nursery and only working bathroom in the house prior to the baby's arrival.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Old Is New Again
programme.desc: John and Tanya purchased a 171-year-old home after a contractor guaranteed it had been totally updated. They're concerned someone is going to fall through their family room floor. Mike and his kids step in and work to make the space safe again.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Nightmares and Dreams
programme.desc: A marathon runner hired a contractor to design her perfect kitchen, but he was unqualified and ended up compromising the home's structure. Now it's up to Mike and his kids to make things right and restore her peace of mind.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Amazing Space: Transforming a Second Floor
programme.desc: Eric meets a couple that needs more personal space. The team constructs a bathroom for the master suite and moves the laundry room to the upstairs level. They refurbish old items and finish the project with a surprise storage bench for winter boots.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: Ben & Ginger: Lessons in Kitchen Renovation
programme.desc: They finally purchased the home of their dreams, but 'Good Morning America' Chief Meteorologist Ginger Zee and her husband Ben Aaron are about to learn some hard lessons as they begin renovating the kitchen.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: Ben & Ginger: Keeping An Eye Out
programme.desc: It's time for Ben and Ginger to tackle their second major project in their house, the master bedroom and bath. Although Ben is getting better with tools, Ginger realizes he can't be left alone when he almost blows the entire budget trying to cut tiles.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: Ben & Ginger: Home Is Where the Hearth Is
programme.desc: Ben and Ginger's renovations move into the living room where they encounter problems with the fireplace. Then, Ginger gets dirty under the house while Ben learns that a door frame is the perfect place to put a door.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: Ben & Ginger: Front and Backyard
programme.desc: With over an acre of property for their son Adrian to play on, Ben and Ginger will forget they ever lived in the city. All they need to do is renovate two decks, install over an acre of sod, build an outdoor fireplace, and install a stone wall.

programme.title: Philly Revival: Philly Street Flippin'
programme.desc: Licensed contractor, real estate expert and designer Rachel Street flips an historic row home in her hometown of Philadelphia, PA. She transforms the first floor into an open-concept space and exposes the brick along one side of the home.

programme.title: Philly Revival: It's Phlippin' Huge
programme.desc: Rachel renovates a grand row home in the up-and-coming neighborhood of East Passyunk. Immediately, she faces structural problems in the century-old property and has to rebuild the entire exterior wall. She also revives the ornate turrets.

programme.title: Philly Revival: It's Phlippin' Small
programme.desc: Rachel Street tackles a tiny row home in South Philly's Whitman district. After extending the second floor to add an additional 150 square feet, she makes the space seem brighter and larger by white washing the interior brick and using light colours.

programme.title: Philly Revival: A Troubled Twin
programme.desc: Rachel tackles a twin row home in Germantown that was partially rehabbed by a previous owner. She quickly discovers the previous work is less than perfect and is forced to rebuild the rotting roof, install new brick on the exterior and add new insulation.

programme.title: Philly Revival: An Urban Retreat
programme.desc: Rachel Street renovates a huge, turn-of-the-century home in the Mt. Airy district. She decides to restore several of the property's original features, including a walled-up sun porch, elaborate fireplaces and cabinetry.

programme.title: Philly Revival: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Rachel takes on a row home that is double the width of a regular row house in the popular Dickinson Narrows neighbourhood. The renovation goes from a cosmetic rehab to a full gut job as she discovers serious plumbing issues.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: To Mike, From Aggie
programme.desc: A nurse who works countless hours at a brain injury center is too busy supporting her family to fix the many problems in her new house. Her mother-in-law Aggie is so desperate to help she delivers a letter straight to Mike's mailbox.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Hilton Head House Hunt
programme.desc: Mike Holmes travels to the beautiful island of Hilton Head, South Carolina, to advise first time homebuyers Caroline and Diego Mahecha during their search for the perfect family home. Mike goes through the houses and identifies issues.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Forever Home in Hilton Head
programme.desc: A couple search for their forever home in Hilton Head. Mike Holmes takes them through the houses and teaches the couple how to choose the best home for their present budget and their future plans.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Holmes Views St. Anthony Homes
programme.desc: In St. Anthony, Minnesota, Rhonda and Leo Bogee are looking for a home that's both within their budget and perfect for their four-member family. Mike goes through houses pointing out the pros and cons for each teaching them how to buy with confidence.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: No Ordinary Buy in Minneapolis
programme.desc: Mike helps Nick and Samantha choose a new home. Sam and Nick are looking at brand new houses and many have yet to be lived in, which means all the more reason to bring along the King of Contractors.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Investment in Brooklyn Park
programme.desc: Carpenter Jake and his realtor wife Lindsay want to buy an investment home to live in, fix up and eventually sell for a profit. The couple shows their favorite options to Mike who helps them see the good, the bad and the ugly.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Mike's Minneapolis Home Hunt
programme.desc: Brenda and Peter have two young daughters and love their Minneapolis neighborhood, but the family has outgrown their home and they're ready to purchase a new one. The couple needs Mike's honest expertise as they view the houses they're considering.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A Guac to Remember
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes the west coast by storm, starting with the Pacific National Exhibition in Vancouver. He gorges on the Big Pickle Dog, then stands at attention for the Colonel Katsu Bao, an Asian-inspired chicken taco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cheesy Rider
programme.desc: At the Prince William County Fair in Manassas, Va., Noah Cappe eats big with a monumental grilled cheese and has his interested peaked by the crab dip-topped Chesapeake Bay poutine.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Get Him to the Greek Pizza
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is The Big Butler Fair in Butler, Penn., where he dines on a Euro-fusion Greek pizza, a crabby patty burger and a deep-fried chili dog, before finally tasting a fluffernutter elephant ear pasty.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Rainbow Confection
programme.desc: Noah Cappe lands at the LA County Fair in Pomona, Calif. for some sunny west coast eats, like the jackfruit torta, PB meatballs and cherry candy-coated cherry punch hot wings. Finally, Noah takes a tasty stroll through the rainbow Ice Cream Garden.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Deep-Fried Frenzy
programme.desc: Nothing's better than a little batter and hot oil. Eddie Jackson tracks down the crunchiest, most-delectable deep-fried foods that will put any food lover in a total frenzy.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: United Tastes of America
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson is the guide on a mouthwatering trip to sample all the classic, iconic dishes of America. From delicious desserts on the Florida coast to spicy-hot chili in the Lone Star State, this is the best way to experience the USA.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Hamburger Heaven
programme.desc: It's burger time, and your favourite food personalities are pointing you in the right direction.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Small Plates, Big Taste
programme.desc: Chef Beau MacMillan dives into scallops; Roger Mooking travels to Texas for succulent chicken.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New Orleans, LA
programme.desc: Casey heads to New Orleans to taste the best of the Big Easy, including a mammoth po' boy and a four-pound sundae packed with eight large scoops of ice cream and smothered with eight different toppings.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Diego, CA
programme.desc: Casey travels to San Diego to face off against a five and a half pound stack of pancakes layered with bacon, eggs, sausage, country-fried steak and thick-cut ham.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Daytona Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Casey's delicious mission brings him to Daytona Beach, Florida, where he takes on a mammoth three-tier sandwich stacked with two burgers, six pieces of Mahi Mahi, two pieces of Texas toast and a ten-ounce bun.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Desert Island Dish
programme.desc: Mayday! Mayday! The chefs and foodies are stranded on a desert island with nothing but an appetite, and they're sharing the one dish they simply can't live without.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Culinary Revolutions
programme.desc: There's no denying that some foods have revolutionized the culinary game while making stomachs happy. Scott Conant gives new meaning to an old favorite with an updated take on classic potato tots.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Decadent Donuts
programme.desc: Alton Brown takes us on a trip to Memphis to honor the original glazed doughnut that started it all.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.desc: When Willie the Giant gets a stomach ache, Mickey's buddy Goofy embarks on a fairytale quest to retrieve a magical elixir that will make his friend feel better. Along the way, Goofy encounters some enchanting characters.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald Hatches an Egg
programme.desc: The clubhouse pals discover a mystery egg among Goofy's rock collection; they try to find out what kind of animal is inside in order to return it to its mother. In the meantime, Donald Duck serves as a reluctant babysitter when the little egg develops.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Ski Trippin'!/ My Fair Pete
programme.desc: On a winter ski trip with her friends, Daisy remembers that she doesn't know how to ski! Pete is worried that he won't be able to impress his Mama when she comes for a visit.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Smarty Goof/ Adventures in Buddysitting!
programme.desc: Mickey and Goofy join the Hot Dog Hills' Invention Competition. Later, when the Hot Tog Hills play center closes, the Happy Helpers become babysitters for the day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Stop Lazlo!/ The Hot Diggity Dog Show
programme.desc: When Commander Heist tries to steal Von Drake's Smarty Hat, Heist's cat gets in the way. The Happy Helpers get called to be pet groomers for The Hot Doggity Dog Show.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Stop That Heist/ Lights! Camera! Help!
programme.desc: Billy Beagle's famous Golden Rumble Seat Roadster becomes the target of an infamous international thief. The Happy Helpers become personal assistants to a movie star!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-charged!/ Super-charged: Mickey's Monster Rally
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake super-charges Mickey's roadster, giving it super-speed and a few surprises. Mickey and the gang must chase after Pete's truck, which was accidentally transformed into a Monster Truck.

programme.title: Bluey: The Doctor / The Claw / Markets
programme.desc: Honey has to wait for Dr. Bingo's appointment; Bluey and Bingo fail to get candy from a claw machine; Bluey wants to buy something from the market.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: I Heart Rufus/ Trolley Trouble
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly reunite Cupcake and Rufus after a fight; Bob forgets his camera on a trolley.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Speedy as a Cheetah / The Soup Search
programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: The Big Mean Green / How Giganto Got His Roar
programme.desc: The Dinos try to prove Gigantos innocence after the lake gets damaged.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Back to Cool/ Baby Breakdown
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy deliver a baby Penguin to Pip's hometown. When Pip and Freddy break the conveyor belt at T.O.T.S. they are determined to fix it on their own.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: Donald's Roadster Round-Up / The Daisy Dance!
programme.desc: On a trip to the convenience store, Donald and Pluto lose all the roadsters; The Happy Helpers take over Clarabelle's dance class.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: Pop Star Helpers/ The Chip 'N Dale 500
programme.desc: The Happy Helpers are hired to get pop star Nina Glitter to her show on time. Chip and Dale shrink everyone down to their size.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks/Good Reef
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly head to Germany to replace the bird in Bob's cuckoo clock. While on a scuba vacation, the pugs search the coral reefs for Bob's lost diving flippers.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Wheels of a Hero / Moonwolfy
